# Yard Guard Landscaping

> Premium artificial turf installation for homes in Mississauga, Etobicoke, and the Greater Toronto Area (GTA). 15+ years of landscaping experience, PFAS-free turf, and a 15-year warranty. Also offers pet-friendly turf and backyard putting greens.

Key facts:
- Location: Mississauga, Ontario, Canada. Serves Mississauga, Etobicoke, Toronto, Brampton, Vaughan, Oakville, Markham, Richmond Hill.
- Phone: (647) 216-7787
- Email: contact@yardguardlandscaping.com
- Pricing: artificial turf typically $12–28 CAD per square foot, depending on package.
- Differentiators: 15+ years experience, 500+ projects, 4.9/5 Google rating, 15-year warranty, PFAS-free turf, free 3D design visualization, Landscape Ontario member.

## Services & Products
- [Pricing & Products](https://ygtoronto.com/products.html): Turf packages and pricing — Easy Lawn ($12–14/sq ft), Pet Yard ($14–17/sq ft), Golfer's Green ($22–28/sq ft). Includes a 15-year cost comparison vs. natural grass.
- [Pet-Friendly Turf](https://ygtoronto.com/pets.html): Artificial turf designed for dogs — drainage, odor control, and durability.
- [How It Works](https://ygtoronto.com/how-it-works.html): The installation process from consultation to finished lawn.
- [Free 3D Design](https://ygtoronto.com/get-3d-design.html): See your yard transformed with a design visualization before installation.
- [Artificial Turf Mississauga](https://ygtoronto.com/artificial-turf-mississauga.html): Local service page for Mississauga.

## Get Started
- [Get a Free Quote](https://ygtoronto.com/quote.html): Request a no-obligation quote and free design visualization.
- [Gallery](https://ygtoronto.com/gallery.html): Before/after photos of completed projects.
- [FAQ](https://ygtoronto.com/faq.html): Common questions about artificial turf, cost, durability, and pets.
